description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Test that runs on push, pull request, a scheduled cron job on Mondays at 9:00, and workflow dispatch. The workflow has three jobs: check, test, and deploy. The check job checks out the code, sets up Python, caches pre-commit dependencies, and runs pre-commit checks with reviewdog. The test job runs tests on multiple Python versions. The deploy job depends on check and test, deploys to PyPI, generates a changelog, creates a GitHub release, and updates the documentation site.
